example: I would like to open a bank account.
The money in a savings account is meant to stay in the account and earn interest over time.
A checking account is designed to use for everyday transactions.
I want to apply for a credit card.
We will have you fill out an application form, please.
How much of a credit limit were you looking for?
I would like a $10,000 spending limit.
You will get 10 reward points for every dollar spent.
You just need to deposit a minimum of $250 into your new checking account.
Your account is set up now.
